'''chotabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equianalgesic|equianalgesic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equianalgesic|equianalgesic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chotabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotabithi|chotabithi]] || [[word:chotabiji|chotabiji]] || [[word:chotabishi|chotabishi]] || [[word:chotabiki|chotabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotabuthuthu|chotabuthuthu]] || [[word:chotabujuju|chotabujuju]] || [[word:chotabushushu|chotabushushu]] || [[word:chotabukuku|chotabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotabuthu|chotabuthu]] || [[word:chotabuju|chotabuju]] || [[word:chotabushu|chotabushu]] || [[word:chotabuku|chotabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotabufthuf|chotabufthuf]] || [[word:chotabufjuf|chotabufjuf]] || [[word:chotabufshuf|chotabufshuf]] || [[word:chotabufkuf|chotabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotabethe|chotabethe]] || [[word:chotabeje|chotabeje]] || [[word:chotabeshe|chotabeshe]] || [[word:chotabeke|chotabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotabothotho|chotabothotho]] || [[word:chotabojojo|chotabojojo]] || [[word:chotaboshosho|chotaboshosho]] || [[word:chotabokoko|chotabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotabotho|chotabotho]] || [[word:chotabojo|chotabojo]] || [[word:chotabosho|chotabosho]] || [[word:chotaboko|chotaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotabofthof|chotabofthof]] || [[word:chotabofjof|chotabofjof]] || [[word:chotabofshof|chotabofshof]] || [[word:chotabofkof|chotabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfthĂŻf|chotabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfjĂŻf|chotabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfshĂŻf|chotabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfkĂŻf|chotabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chotabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chotabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chotabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chotabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfthĂŻf|chotabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfjĂŻf|chotabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfshĂŻf|chotabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfkĂŻf|chotabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfthĂŻf|chotabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfjĂŻf|chotabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfshĂŻf|chotabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chotabĂŻfkĂŻf|chotabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chotabĂŠthĂŠ|chotabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chotabĂŠjĂŠ|chotabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chotabĂŠshĂŠ|chotabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chotabĂŠkĂŠ|chotabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chotabathatha|chotabathatha]] || [[word:chotabajaja|chotabajaja]] || [[word:chotabashasha|chotabashasha]] || [[word:chotabakaka|chotabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chotabatha|chotabatha]] || [[word:chotabaja|chotabaja]] || [[word:chotabasha|chotabasha]] || [[word:chotabaka|chotabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chotabafthaf|chotabafthaf]] || [[word:chotabafjaf|chotabafjaf]] || [[word:chotabafshaf|chotabafshaf]] || [[word:chotabafkaf|chotabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chotabasha|chotabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotabshĂ«asha|chotabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotabroasha|chotabroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotabmuasha|chotabmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotabyaasha|chotabyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotabnkshĂ«asha|gochotabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotabnkroasha|gochotabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotabnkmuasha|gochotabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotabnkyaasha|gochotabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chotatabasha|chotatabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotatabshĂ«asha|chotatabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotatabroasha|chotatabroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotatabmuasha|chotatabmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotatabyaasha|chotatabyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotatabnkshĂ«asha|gochotatabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotatabnkroasha|gochotatabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotatabnkmuasha|gochotatabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotatabnkyaasha|gochotatabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chetĂŠbasha|chetĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chetĂŠbshĂ«asha|chetĂŠbshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chetĂŠbroasha|chetĂŠbroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chetĂŠbmuasha|chetĂŠbmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chetĂŠbyaasha|chetĂŠbyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochetĂŠbnkshĂ«asha|gochetĂŠbnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochetĂŠbnkroasha|gochetĂŠbnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochetĂŠbnkmuasha|gochetĂŠbnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochetĂŠbnkyaasha|gochetĂŠbnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chotfabasha|chotfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chotfabshĂ«asha|chotfabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chotfabroasha|chotfabroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chotfabmuasha|chotfabmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chotfabyaasha|chotfabyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochotfabnkshĂ«asha|gochotfabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochotfabnkroasha|gochotfabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochotfabnkmuasha|gochotfabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochotfabnkyaasha|gochotfabnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
